tasks.subject: Task 1: Create /offline page
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Static fallback page that next-pwa precaches and serves when navigation fails offline.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/app/offline/page.tsx`
- Create: `src/app/offline/page.test.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Page renders "Нет подключения" heading
- [ ] Page renders explanatory text about opening online first
- [ ] "Попробовать снова" button calls `window.location.reload()`
- [ ] No imports from `@/auth`, `next-auth`, Prisma, or any API
- [ ] Test file passes

**Verify:** `npx vitest run src/app/offline/page.test.tsx` → 3 tests pass

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/app/offline/page.tsx", "src/app/offline/page.test.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npx vitest run src/app/offline/page.test.tsx", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Renders Нет подключения heading", "Renders hint text", "Reload button calls window.location.reload", "No server-side imports"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Update next.config.ts — StaleWhileRevalidate + fallbacks
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Configure the service worker to cache pages eagerly and serve /offline when navigation fails.

**Files:**
- Modify: `next.config.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] handler for pages rule is `StaleWhileRevalidate` (no networkTimeoutSeconds)
- [ ] `fallbacks: { document: "/offline" }` present
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] `public/sw.js` generated after build

**Verify:** `npm run build` → exits 0, `public/sw.js` exists

```json:metadata
{"files": ["next.config.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build && ls public/sw.js", "acceptanceCriteria": ["StaleWhileRevalidate handler", "fallbacks.document = /offline", "Build succeeds", "sw.js generated"]}
```
